content: Unified manifest (JSON, Teams-style) is the modern format and can combine add-in with other Microsoft 365/Copilot extensions; add-in-only XML manifest (MS-OWEMXML schema) remains fully supported for production Office Add-ins and is NOT deprecated/mandatory-migrated as of the docs checked (2025-2026 dated pages). AppSource auto-generates an add-in-only manifest from a unified-manifest package for legacy platform compatibility (Mac, mobile, older Windows builds).
